arabicText: إِنَّ الِاتِّبَاعَ لِلشَّرِيعَةِ هُوَ الْأَصْلُ الْأَصِيلُ فِي طَرِيقِ الْقَوْمِ
latinTransliteration: Innal-ittibā‘a lish-sharī‘ati huwal-aṣlul-aṣīlu fī ṭarīqil-qawm
englishTranslation: Indeed, adherence to the Sharia is the ultimate foundation in the path of the people of Sufism.
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëggal sariya mooy ndëgërlay yoon wi ci bépp yoonu Tasawwuf.
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّالْ شَرِيعَ مُويْ نْدِجِࣺرْلَيْ يُونْ وِ سِ بِيقْ يُونُ تَصَوُّفْ

arabicText: وَلَا يَجُوزُ مُخَالَفَةُ الْفِقْهِ وَالسُّنَّةِ بِحَالٍ مِنَ الْأَحْوَالِ عِنْدَ الْمُرِيدِ
latinTransliteration: Wa lā yajūzu mukhālafatul-fiqhi was-sunnati bi-ḥālin minal-aḥwāli ‘indal-murīd
englishTranslation: And it is not permissible for the seeker to oppose jurisprudence and the Sunnah under any circumstances.
wolofTranslationStandard: Te warul ci murid bi mu moy yoonu fiqh walla sunnah sa sùnek.
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ وَرُلْ سِ مُرِيدْ بِ مُ مُيْ يُونُ فِقْهْ وَلَّ سُنَّهْ سَ سُنِكْ

arabicText: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ الَّتِي لَا شَرِيعَةَ مَعَهَا بَاطِلَةٌ وَمَرْدُودَةٌ بِالْيَقِينِ
latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatul-latī lā sharī‘ata ma‘ahā bāṭilatun wa mardūdatun bil-yaqīn
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth (Haqiqa) that is not accompanied by sacred law (Sharia) is falsehood and rejected with certainty.
wolofTranslationStandard: Mbiir gu sell gu andul ak sariya, lu daganadi la te dañ koy delloo.
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ جُ سِلْ جُ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ شَرِيعَ لُ دَجَنَدِ لَ تِ دَنْ كُيْ دِلُّو

arabicText: عَلَيْكُمْ بِالتَّمَسُّكِ بِالْكِتَابِ وَالسُّنَّةِ فِي السُّرِّ وَالْعَلَنِ دائماً

englishTranslation: You must hold fast to the Book and the Sunnah in private and in public at all times. (Stanza 100)
wolofTranslationStandard: Sàmmeel sa bopp Alxuraan ak Sunnah ci lëndëm ak ci leer. (Wers 100)
wolofalAjamiScript: سَمِّيلْ سَ بُپْ اَلْخُرَانْ اَكْ سُنَّهْ سِ لِࣺنْدِࣺمْ اَكْ سِ لِيرْ [100]

arabicText: إِنَّ الِاتِّبَاعَ لِلشَّرِيعَةِ هُوَ الْأَصْلُ الْأَصِيلُ فِي طَرِيقِ الْقَوْمِ [101]
latinTransliteration: Innal-ittibā‘a lish-sharī‘ati huwal-aṣlul-aṣīlu fī ṭarīqil-qawm (101)
englishTranslation: Indeed, adherence to the Sharia is the ultimate foundation in the path of the people of Sufism. (Stanza 101)
wolofTranslationStandard: Dëggal sariya mooy ndëgërlay yoon wi ci bépp yoonu Tasawwuf. (Wers 101)
wolofalAjamiScript: دِࣺجّالْ شَرِيعَ مُويْ نْدِجِࣺرْلَيْ يُونْ وِ سِ بِيقْ يُونُ تَصَوُّفْ [101]

arabicText: وَلَا يَجُوزُ مُخَالَفَةُ الْفِقْهِ وَالسُّنَّةِ بِحَالٍ مِنَ الْأَحْوَالِ عِنْدَ الْمُرِيدِ [102]
latinTransliteration: Wa lā yajūzu mukhālafatul-fiqhi was-sunnati bi-ḥālin minal-aḥwāli ‘indal-murīd (102)
englishTranslation: And it is not permissible for the seeker to oppose jurisprudence and the Sunnah under any circumstances. (Stanza 102)
wolofTranslationStandard: Te warul ci murid bi mu moy yoonu fiqh walla sunnah sa sùnek. (Wers 102)
wolofalAjamiScript: تِ وَرُلْ سِ مُرِيدْ بِ مُ مُيْ يُونُ فِقْهْ وَلَّ سُنَّهْ سَ سُنِكْ [102]

arabicText: فَالْحَقِيقَةُ الَّتِي لَا شَرِيعَةَ مَعَهَا بَاطِلَةٌ وَمَرْدُودَةٌ بِالْيَقِينِ [103]
latinTransliteration: Fal-ḥaqīqatul-latī lā sharī‘ata ma‘ahā bāṭilatun wa mardūdatun bil-yaqīn (103)
englishTranslation: For spiritual truth (Haqiqa) that is not accompanied by sacred law (Sharia) is falsehood and rejected with certainty. (Stanza 103)
wolofTranslationStandard: Mbiir gu sell gu andul ak sariya, lu daganadi la te dañ koy delloo. (Wers 103)
wolofalAjamiScript: مْبِيرْ جُ سِلْ جُ اَنْدُلْ اَكْ شَرِيعَ لُ دَجَنَدِ لَ تِ دَنْ كُيْ دِلُّو [103]
